items.name: spa/poke/55a876c: Remove DB concurrency from updateActiveAgentsRequirements (#24624)
items.summary:
updateActiveAgentsRequirements was processing all agents concurrently, leading to many concurrent DB connections.

Even though it had a concurrency limit of 5, the problem is that they each called fetchMCPServer
